title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!
